links.title: HVAC
links.tooltip: View HVAC ventilation and energy details

links.title: Valot
links.tooltip: View light switch status by floor

targets.query:
from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "rooms")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.room_type != "pid")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.floor == "1")
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ruuvi")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.sensor_name == "Olohuone" or r.sensor_name == "Takka" or r.sensor_name == "Sauna" or r.sensor_name == "Ulkolämpötila")
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: r.sensor_name, _time: now()}))
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "rooms")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.room_type != "pid")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.floor == "1")
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => {
      age_s = (int(v: now()) - int(v: r._time)) / 1000000000
      return {
        _time: now(),
        _field: r._field + "_age",
        _value: if age_s < 120 then string(v: age_s) + "s ago"
                else if age_s < 7200 then string(v: age_s / 60) + "m ago"
                else if age_s < 172800 then string(v: age_s / 3600) + "h ago"
                else string(v: age_s / 86400) + "d ago"
      }
  })
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ruuvi")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.sensor_name == "Olohuone" or r.sensor_name == "Takka" or r.sensor_name == "Sauna" or r.sensor_name == "Ulkolämpötila")
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => {
      age_s = (int(v: now()) - int(v: r._time)) / 1000000000
      return {
        _time: now(),
        _field: r.sensor_name + "_age",
        _value: if age_s < 120 then string(v: age_s) + "s ago"
                else if age_s < 7200 then string(v: age_s / 60) + "m ago"
                else if age_s < 172800 then string(v: age_s / 3600) + "h ago"
                else string(v: age_s / 86400) + "d ago"
      }
  })
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")

import "strings"

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "rooms")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.room_type == "pid")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.floor == "1")
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with
      _field: strings.trimSuffix(v: r._field, suffix: "_PID") + "_heat",
      _time: now()
  }))
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "rooms")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.room_type == "common")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field != "Ylakerran_aula")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ruuvi")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.sensor_name == "Olohuone")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: r.sensor_name + " (Ruuvi)"}))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "hvac")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "Ulkolampotila")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "Ulkolämpötila"}))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "rooms")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.room_type == "bedroom")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "MH_alakerta")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "rooms")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.room_type != "pid")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.floor == "2")
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "rooms")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.room_type != "pid")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.floor == "2")
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => {
      age_s = (int(v: now()) - int(v: r._time)) / 1000000000
      return {
        _time: now(),
        _field: r._field + "_age",
        _value: if age_s < 120 then string(v: age_s) + "s ago"
                else if age_s < 7200 then string(v: age_s / 60) + "m ago"
                else if age_s < 172800 then string(v: age_s / 3600) + "h ago"
                else string(v: age_s / 86400) + "d ago"
      }
  })
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")

import "strings"

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "rooms")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.room_type == "pid")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.floor == "2")
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with
      _field: strings.trimSuffix(v: r._field, suffix: "_PID") + "_heat",
      _time: now()
  }))
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "rooms")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.room_type == "bedroom")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field != "MH_alakerta")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "hvac")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "Ulkolampotila")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "Ulkolämpötila"}))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "rooms")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.room_type == "common")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "Ylakerran_aula")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "rooms")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.room_type == "basement")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ruuvi")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.sensor_name == "Sauna")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "temperature" or r._field == "humidity")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: if r._field == "temperature" then "Sauna" else "Kosteus"}))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "rooms")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.room_type == "pid")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "rooms")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.room_type == "pid")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> group(columns: ["_time", "floor"])
  |> sum()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r._value, _field: if r.floor == "2" then "2. kerros" else if r.floor == "1" then "1. kerros" else "Kellari"}))
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])
